title: Korak 14

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: Vaša izjava o if bi trebalo da proveri da li je name ili level primer str.
tests.testString:
({ test: () => runPython(`
  cond = _Node(_code).find_class("Employee").find_function("__init__").find_ifs()[0].find_conditions()[0]
  conditions = [
    "not (isinstance(name, str) and isinstance(level, str))",
    "not isinstance(name, str) or not isinstance(level, str)",
    "not (isinstance(level, str) and isinstance(name, str))",
    "not isinstance(level, str) or not isinstance(name, str)",
  ]
  assert any(cond.is_equivalent(c) for c in conditions)
`) })

tests.text: Vaša izjava o if treba da proizvede TypeError sa porukom od 'name' and 'level' attribute must be of type 'str'.
tests.testString: ({ test: () => assert(runPython(`_Node(_code).find_class("Employee").find_function("__init__").find_ifs()[0].find_bodies()[0].has_stmt('raise TypeError("\\'name\\' and \\'level\\' attribute must be of type \\'str\\'.")')`)) })

description:
Sada je vreme da dodamo validaciju u metodu __init__. Na početku te metode, kreiraj deklaraciju if koja proverava da li je name ili level nije instanca od str.

Unutar deklaracije if, ukloni TypeError sa porukom 'name' and 'level' attribute must be of type 'str'.
